title: Build and Ship a Production Feed Aggregator in TypeScript 7 and Node 24
description: Advanced TypeScript backend learners ready to integrate syndication standards, hostile XML, runtime validation, Fetch and Promise ownership, PostgreSQL, Express, accessible presentation, security, testing, deployment, and recovery into one cumulative service. This original, research-backed path uses repeated retrieval, cumulative artifacts, changed-case labs, stakeholder projects, and a performance exam.
outcomes: Demonstrate a cumulative multi-tenant rss 2.0 and atom 1.0 service from authorized discovery through secure runtime validation, publisher-friendly ingestion, postgresql search, express apis, and an accessible content-safe reader through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate typescript 7 and node 24 source-to-emission evidence, fast-xml-parser hardening, zod admission, fetch streams and abortsignal ownership, pg transactions, durable scheduling, fenced workers, asynclocalstorage telemetry, security, testing, packaging, deployment, backup, and recovery through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

Demonstrate original deterministic browser models plus controlled compiler, emitted node, loopback http, postgresql, handle, subprocess, container, load, accessibility, backup, restore, and release transfer gates through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.
Demonstrate five distinct stakeholder projects and a cumulative production defense through an independently verified stakeholder artifact.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Design sources, subscriptions, entries, timelines, search, and reader-state resources around client decisions and method semantics.

competencies.statement: Order authority, request identity, limits, authentication, negotiation, validation, authorization, handlers, not-found, and error middleware explicitly.
misconceptions: Express automatically chooses the safest middleware order.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Order authority, request identity, limits, authentication, negotiation, validation, authorization, handlers, not-found, and error middleware explicitly.

competencies.statement: Use Express 5 Promise rejection flow while preventing double next, double send, partial response, and lost unknown causes.
misconceptions: Any thrown async value is a safe Error with a public message.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Use Express 5 Promise rejection flow while preventing double next, double send, partial response, and lost unknown causes.

competencies.statement: Compose request close, timeout, shutdown, and application ownership and propagate cancellation without undoing committed background jobs.
misconceptions: Node automatically cancels Fetch and PostgreSQL work on client disconnect.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Compose request close, timeout, shutdown, and application ownership and propagate cancellation without undoing committed background jobs.

competencies.statement: Track headers, streaming, terminal response, cleanup, and error behavior so every request has one bounded outcome.
misconceptions: Checking res.headersSent eliminates every response race.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Track headers, streaming, terminal response, cleanup, and error behavior so every request has one bounded outcome.

competencies.statement: Validate params, query, headers, body, content type, size, cardinality, and unknown fields before constructing a command.
misconceptions: Express request generic parameters validate client data at runtime.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Validate params, query, headers, body, content type, size, cardinality, and unknown fields before constructing a command.

competencies.statement: Define string, number, boolean, date, enum, array, empty, repeated, and default coercion explicitly and test ambiguity.
misconceptions: Zod coercion always matches HTTP client intent.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Define string, number, boolean, date, enum, array, empty, repeated, and default coercion explicitly and test ambiguity.

competencies.statement: Map stable domain and infrastructure causes to bounded RFC 9457 types, statuses, field evidence, correlation, and retry guidance.
misconceptions: Returning error.message is the most transparent API design.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Map stable domain and infrastructure causes to bounded RFC 9457 types, statuses, field evidence, correlation, and retry guidance.

competencies.statement: Negotiate media, charset, language, compression, conditional behavior, and unsupported variants without accidental fallbacks.
misconceptions: JSON endpoints can ignore Accept and Content-Type.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Negotiate media, charset, language, compression, conditional behavior, and unsupported variants without accidental fallbacks.

competencies.statement: Generate or compare OpenAPI 3.2 operations and schemas against runtime validators, auth, examples, errors, pagination, and compatibility tests.
misconceptions: A generated OpenAPI file cannot drift from actual middleware.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate or compare OpenAPI 3.2 operations and schemas against runtime validators, auth, examples, errors, pagination, and compatibility tests.

competencies.statement: Verify issuer, audience, allowed algorithm, signature, time, key lifecycle, and transport before creating a minimal readonly principal.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Verify issuer, audience, allowed algorithm, signature, time, key lifecycle, and transport before creating a minimal readonly principal.

competencies.statement: Authorize application commands from principal, tenant, role, ownership, relationship, purpose, and current state rather than route alone.
misconceptions: Authentication middleware makes later resource access safe.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Authorize application commands from principal, tenant, role, ownership, relationship, purpose, and current state rather than route alone.

competencies.statement: Require tenant scope in repository methods, SQL, keys, constraints, caches, tests, metrics, exports, support, and admin operations.
misconceptions: A request-scoped tenant property prevents repository mistakes.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Require tenant scope in repository methods, SQL, keys, constraints, caches, tests, metrics, exports, support, and admin operations.

competencies.statement: Limit collection, use, retention, access, export, and deletion of follows, read state, searches, content warnings, and device metadata.
misconceptions: Personalization data is operational and therefore nonsensitive.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Limit collection, use, retention, access, export, and deletion of follows, read state, searches, content warnings, and device metadata.

competencies.statement: Audit actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation while redacting tokens, private URLs, feed content, search text, SQL, and secrets.

masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Audit actor, decision, resource, outcome, and correlation while redacting tokens, private URLs, feed content, search text, SQL, and secrets.

competencies.statement: Choose a documented total order with unique tie-breaker and state which edits can move an entry.
misconceptions: publishedAt alone orders every row stably.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Choose a documented total order with unique tie-breaker and state which edits can move an entry.

competencies.statement: Runtime-validate version, tenant, direction, sort values, filters, expiry, and integrity without granting authority or query control.

competencies.statement: Implement forward and reverse keyset predicates aligned with sort, null policy, index, limit-plus-one, and output reversal.
misconceptions: Changing greater-than to less-than is complete backward pagination.
masteryEvidence: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Implement forward and reverse keyset predicates aligned with sort, null policy, index, limit-plus-one, and output reversal.

competencies.statement: Test ties, inserts, revisions, deletions, hidden entries, filter drift, expiry, empty pages, and repeated navigation.

competencies.statement: Provide keyboard-operable next and previous navigation, focus continuity, result context, URL state, reflow, and no infinite-scroll dependency.

competencies.statement: Build weighted tsvector documents from admitted safe text with language, provenance, refresh, and deletion policy.

competencies.statement: Validate length, token count, mode, language, filters, and empty results before using parameterized plainto, websearch, or explicit tsquery.

competencies.statement: Verify representative GIN-backed plans, selectivity, scale, write amplification, latency, row limits, and plan-change thresholds.

competencies.statement: Combine text rank, recency, source preferences, and deterministic tie-breakers with transparent non-objective semantics.

competencies.statement: Return bounded safe text snippets or sanitize controlled markers and validate every field before rendering.

competencies.statement: Treat every title, person, summary, content, image, category, language, date, and URL as untrusted even after XML validation.

competencies.statement: Use logical headings, landmarks, lists, source and date metadata, language, descriptive links, content warnings, and provenance.

competencies.statement: Keep complete keyboard operation, visible focus, large targets, polite refresh and error announcements, and stable focus after updates or pagination.

competencies.statement: Support zoom and narrow reflow, reduced motion, non-color state, image alternatives, user-controlled media, and structured text fallback.

competencies.statement: Model read, unread, star, hide, save, tag, and note relationships by principal, tenant, and entry without changing shared content.

competencies.statement: Accept explicit desired state with idempotency and optional version preconditions instead of ambiguous toggles.

competencies.statement: Define bounded atomic or per-item bulk behavior with authorization, typed results, retry identity, and complete reconciliation.

competencies.statement: Detect stale versions and apply a declared resolution policy with user-visible recovery rather than silent last-write assumptions.

competencies.statement: Maintain or derive counts transactionally, invalidate caches, detect drift, repair safely, and test concurrent state changes.
